reasoning: Mistral AI's recent models (like Mistral Medium 3) only claim to reach ~90% of the performance of leading models like Claude 3.7 Sonnet. Given their comparatively limited compute resources (~1,500 H100s as of early 2024) compared to giants like OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Meta, and analyst views that their influence is "fading", the probability of them suddenly releasing a model that achieves the absolute #1 score on the highly competitive Chatbot Arena leaderboard by December 31, 2025 is extremely low.
batch_queries: Will Mistral AI have the top AI model on December 31?
